message:
fix(conformance): include contract_ok in pass check, respect dtype/device in dispatch cases

- NnStateCaseReport::passed() now gates on contract_ok in addition to
  expectation_ok and detail_ok, preventing false passes.
- Deduplicate scalar/tensor_meta conformance runs when both FT-P2C-001
  and FT-P2C-005 packets are in scope (avoids redundant computation).
- evaluate_dispatch_output now reads lhs/rhs dtype and device from the
  DispatchCase instead of hardcoding F64/Cpu.
- Tighten squeeze non-singleton test to assert shape preservation.
- Fix path traversal: reject relative paths escaping root even when
  allow_absolute_paths is enabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
